PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-14-2014 Continued To Jun-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thea Eliot for Perry Peirano.

Ms. Eliot stated that they have done everything they can at their end to get the creditor's claims cleared, that they have no control over having the two other creditors withdraw their claims and that they need to wait for time to expire in May. Status report was continued to June 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thea Eliot for Perry Peirano (Administrator).

The status report was continued to March 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper service/notice.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Mar-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thea Eliot for Perry Peirano.

Ms. Eliot stated that they have just about cleared the last Creditor's Claim and that the petition for final distribution is about 80% ready. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to March 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
